TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Sir Frederick Grant Banting == Mitelek ko Linhoko nai 2007 mihecaan oya "Romi'ad no mafotosay i hekal" pacakaten pala "Romi'ad no mafotosay i Linhoko". Ci Sir Frederick Grant Banting, KBE,MC,FRS,FRSC, (1891 miheca 11 folad 14 romi'ad ‚Äď 1941 miheca 2 folad 21 romi'ad) o cecay a Canada tamdaw o Isito, Noperu seirikakku ano eca o ikakuso a kacingangan mapatamohong. Ni'oripan Ci Sir Frederick Grant Banting masofoc i Alliston, Ontario no Canada, misawad i Toronto daykako, o malaisingay no sofitay no Canada i saka cecay laloodan itiya. I 1919 miheca minokay ci Sir Frederick Grant Banting, itira i Londonsi no Ontario patireng to isingan. Nai 1919 miheca ‚Äď 1920 miheca malaising i kaemangay isingan i Toronto, saan minanam cingra to misalofay to fanges pitokadan. Nanoya nai 1920 miheca ‚Äď 1921 miheca citodong cingra i Saetipan Ontario daykako (Western Ontario University) misalofay to fanges pitokadan a singsi, i 1921 miheca ‚Äď 1922 miheca citodong cingra i no Kusuri rigaku a malasingsi. Itiya i 1922 miheca pakalayap ci Sir Frederick Grant Banting to Ikaku no kakui ato cecay a ekim a kompay. I 1922 miheca a kaciherangan, ci Sir Frederick Grant Banting ato padamaay ningra ci Charles Herbert Best mikingkiw to pakayraan miadah to mafotosay itiya i, masanga' nangra ko sapi'emet to ci'odaxay remes a saciwsya sapaiyo, oya a Isletin hananay . Onini a sapaiyo oya aniniay a nisanga'ay a Cinko insurin hananay. I'ayaw no 1922 miheca, o caacaay ko mamanga'ay maadah ko mafotosay adada. Nawhani o sakalakec no isingan mikingkiw, itiraay i 1923 miheca ci Sir Frederick Grant Banting pakalayap to Noperu seirikaku ikakuso a tamohong itiya, 32 ko mihecaan ningra itiya, o malakapahay ho ko cinialaay to Noperu seirikaku ikakuso a tamohong. O nialaan ningra a kinaira no Noperu a payso a hofi a litosa pafelien ningra ko midamaay cingraan. Oya hongti no Inkiris ci George V i 1935 miheca patamohong to tadamaanay tamdaw ci Sir Frederick Grant Bantingan. Talacowa ikor to no 1919 miheca, o Canada a tamdaw o eca to pakalayap tono Inkiris a patamohong, nika i 1935 mihecaan, padeteng ko Sotoku no Canada patodong ci Sir Frederick Grant Bantingan pala o "sir Frederick" sanay tadamaan. I 1930 mihecaan i, misatapang to ci Sir Frederick Grant Banting to sakihar to kaci'icel no Nazi Germany. Orasaka misitapang to cingra to sofitay a kakak kingkiwan, mangalef saki Namamonoheiki oyobi kagaku heiki, ika Namamonoheiki a pikingkiw, nano o mawarakay to Masutadogasu pitanam, o macedetay a taker. Sapitena' G a riko' to "G-suit" o pikingkiw ni Sir Frederick Grant Banting no sofitay, sapidama to parakatay to hikoki, Uchu hikosi i kacomikayan katalawan a miseka'. Saka i saka tosa lalood no hekal itiya, maemin ci riko' ko parakatay to hikoki no Canada to nano misanga'an ningra. I satadamaanay no 'orip ningra i, i 1941 miheca 2 folad 21 romi'ad itiya, nawhani mapatay i katatiihan no hikoki, mikalic cingra to hikoki ona i Fenlan tayra i Inkiris, talacowa o maan ko sakatayra ningra i Inkiris o kaoratan, nika sanga'ayay tayra cingra i Inkiris kakakusa papisaadihay misanga' to Namamonoheiki sapico'ay to Nacisu Toitsu, itira i Toronto no Ontario matadem ci Sir Frederick Grant Banting. Piharatengan I Canata, Western Daykako pitilidan a isikakko, ira mapangangan ko rawang no ptilidan, itira i Canada ira ko tosaay pitilidan mapangangan ko ngangan ningra. I 2004 miheca, o pahosoay kosi i Canada midemak to "satadamaanay tamdaw no Canada" a piritosan, o saka sepat ci Sir Frederick Grant Banting. Google pasalongan (Googleś®ôť°Ć) 1.2016ŚĻī11śúą14śó•,GoogleśõīśĒĻť¶Ėť†ĀÁöĄGoogle Doodle, . Romi'ad no mafotosay i Linhoko I 1991 miheca, Isi sakapot no hekal ato kasakitakit mafotosay lekapot o kasofocan romi'ad ni Sir Frederick Grant Banting pala o Romi'ad no mafotosay i hekal. I 2006 miheca 12 folad 20 romi'ad, mitelek ko Linhoko nai 2007 miheca oya "Romi'ad no mafotosay i hekal" pacakaten pala "Romi'ad no mafotosay i Linhoko" sato.

S.FORM: == Sir Frederick Grant Banting == Mitelek ko Linhoko nai 2007 mihecaan oya "Romi'ad no mafotosay i hekal" pacakaten pala "Romi'ad no mafotosay i Linhoko". Ci Sir Frederick Grant Banting, KBE,MC,FRS,FRSC, (1891 miheca 11 folad 14 romi'ad ‚Äď 1941 miheca 2 folad 21 romi'ad) o cecay a Canada tamdaw o Isito, Noperu seirikakku ano eca o ikakuso a kacingangan mapatamohong. Ni'oripan Ci Sir Frederick Grant Banting masofoc i Alliston, Ontario no Canada, misawad i Toronto daykako, o malaisingay no sofitay no Canada i saka cecay laloodan itiya. I 1919 miheca minokay ci Sir Frederick Grant Banting, itira i Londonsi no Ontario patireng to isingan. Nai 1919 miheca ‚Äď 1920 miheca malaising i kaemangay isingan i Toronto, saan minanam cingra to misalofay to fanges pitokadan. Nanoya nai 1920 miheca ‚Äď 1921 miheca citodong cingra i Saetipan Ontario daykako (Western Ontario University) misalofay to fanges pitokadan a singsi, i 1921 miheca ‚Äď 1922 miheca citodong cingra i no Kusuri rigaku a malasingsi. Itiya i 1922 miheca pakalayap ci Sir Frederick Grant Banting to Ikaku no kakui ato cecay a ekim a kompay. I 1922 miheca a kaciherangan, ci Sir Frederick Grant Banting ato padamaay ningra ci Charles Herbert Best mikingkiw to pakayraan miadah to mafotosay itiya i, masanga' nangra ko sapi'emet to ci'odaxay remes a saciwsya sapaiyo, oya a Isletin hananay . Onini a sapaiyo oya aniniay a nisanga'ay a Cinko insurin hananay. I'ayaw no 1922 miheca, o caacaay ko mamanga'ay maadah ko mafotosay adada. Nawhani o sakalakec no isingan mikingkiw, itiraay i 1923 miheca ci Sir Frederick Grant Banting pakalayap to Noperu seirikaku ikakuso a tamohong itiya, 32 ko mihecaan ningra itiya, o malakapahay ho ko cinialaay to Noperu seirikaku ikakuso a tamohong. O nialaan ningra a kinaira no Noperu a payso a hofi a litosa pafelien ningra ko midamaay cingraan. Oya hongti no Inkiris ci George V i 1935 miheca patamohong to tadamaanay tamdaw ci Sir Frederick Grant Bantingan. Talacowa ikor to no 1919 miheca, o Canada a tamdaw o eca to pakalayap tono Inkiris a patamohong, nika i 1935 mihecaan, padeteng ko Sotoku no Canada patodong ci Sir Frederick Grant Bantingan pala o "sir Frederick" sanay tadamaan. I 1930 mihecaan i, misatapang to ci Sir Frederick Grant Banting to sakihar to kaci'icel no Nazi Germany. Orasaka misitapang to cingra to sofitay a kakak kingkiwan, mangalef saki Namamonoheiki oyobi kagaku heiki, ika Namamonoheiki a pikingkiw, nano o mawarakay to Masutadogasu pitanam, o macedetay a taker. Sapitena' G a riko' to "G-suit" o pikingkiw ni Sir Frederick Grant Banting no sofitay, sapidama to parakatay to hikoki, Uchu hikosi i kacomikayan katalawan a miseka'. Saka i saka tosa lalood no hekal itiya, maemin ci riko' ko parakatay to hikoki no Canada to nano misanga'an ningra. I satadamaanay no 'orip ningra i, i 1941 miheca 2 folad 21 romi'ad itiya, nawhani mapatay i katatiihan no hikoki, mikalic cingra to hikoki ona i Fenlan tayra i Inkiris, talacowa o maan ko sakatayra ningra i Inkiris o kaoratan, nika sanga'ayay tayra cingra i Inkiris kakakusa papisaadihay misanga' to Namamonoheiki sapico'ay to Nacisu Toitsu, itira i Toronto no Ontario matadem ci Sir Frederick Grant Banting. Piharatengan I Canata, Western Daykako pitilidan a isikakko, ira mapangangan ko rawang no ptilidan, itira i Canada ira ko tosaay pitilidan mapangangan ko ngangan ningra. I 2004 miheca, o pahosoay kosi i Canada midemak to "satadamaanay tamdaw no Canada" a piritosan, o saka sepat ci Sir Frederick Grant Banting. Google pasalongan (Googleś®ôť°Ć) 1.2016ŚĻī11śúą14śó•,GoogleśõīśĒĻť¶Ėť†ĀÁöĄGoogle Doodle, . Romi'ad no mafotosay i Linhoko I 1991 miheca, Isi sakapot no hekal ato kasakitakit mafotosay lekapot o kasofocan romi'ad ni Sir Frederick Grant Banting pala o Romi'ad no mafotosay i hekal. I 2006 miheca 12 folad 20 romi'ad, mitelek ko Linhoko nai 2007 miheca oya "Romi'ad no mafotosay i hekal" pacakaten pala "Romi'ad no mafotosay i Linhoko" sato.

**** mińß…ô ¶a paka…ĺajap ¶i sir fr…ô…¨~…ģ…ôri ¶k *rant b~b~vantiŇč to~u ikako~u~u no~u kako~u~ui ato~u ¶…ô ¶aj a …ôkim a ko~umpaj. i **** mińß…ô ¶a a ka ¶ińß…ôraŇčan, ¶i sir fr…ô…¨~…ģ…ôri ¶k *rant b~b~vantiŇč ato~u pa…¨~…ģamaaj niŇčra ¶i ¶ńßar…ĺ…ôs ńß…ôrb~b~v…ôrt b~b~v…ôst mikiŇčkiw to~u pakajraan mia…¨~…ģańß to~u mafo~uto~usaj itija i, masaŇča ° naŇčra ko~u sapi °…ôm…ôt to~u ¶i °o~u…¨~…ģaxaj r…ôm…ôs a sa ¶iwsja sapaijo~u, o~uja a is…ĺ…ôtin ńßananaj . o~unini a sapaijo~u o~uja aniniaj a nisaŇča °aj a ¶inko~u inso~u~urin ńßananaj. i °ajaw no~u **** mińß…ô ¶a, o~u ¶aa ¶aaj ko~u mamaŇča °aj
